text: I wake up at six every morning and immediately drink a glass of water. After stretching for ten minutes, I take a quick shower and have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and fruit. My work starts at nine, and I typically focus on tasks until lunch. I eat at my desk while reviewing emails. In the afternoon, I make sure to take a short walk to refresh my mind. After work, I go for a thirty-minute run or do yoga at home. Evenings are for dinner, reading, or watching a show with my family. By ten thirty, I’m in bed. This routine keeps me productive and balanced.
